text_original: This app is very awesome. I love it so much. This is my first experience but I enjoy it a lot. Thanks
text_zh: 这个应用太棒了。我非常喜欢它。这是我第一次体验，但我非常享受。谢谢。
reply_original: Welcome to Fantasia! We are absolutely thrilled to hear that your first experience has been so wonderful. Knowing that you love the app makes all our hard work worth it. We promise to keep improving and creating more magical moments for you. Thank you for being awesome and joining us on this journey!
reply_zh: 欢迎来到 Fantasia！听到您的首次体验如此美妙，我们感到无比欣喜。知道您喜欢这款应用，让我们所有的付出都变得值得。我们承诺将不断改进，为您创造更多奇妙的时刻。感谢如此棒的你与我们同行！
